prompt: A highly detailed anime illustration of a fashionable young woman on an elegant daytime outing in a European-style flower street, shown in a full-body to three-quarter standing pose. She has deep indigo blue hair styled in 2 very long twin-tails with soft shine, loose strands, and white rose-and-frill hair accessories tied with black ribbons. She wears a romantic white mini dress with a fitted corset-like bodice, sweetheart neckline, black bow at the chest, layered ruffles, a dramatic asymmetrical overskirt, and white rose decorations at the waist. Her accessories include 1 black choker with a white flower ornament, 1 black armband on the upper arm, 2 white frilled wrist cuffs, 2 black garter straps, 2 sheer black thigh-high stockings with lace tops, and she carries 1 small black handbag. Her expression should feel delicate, elegant, and slightly shy, with one hand lifting a lock of hair and the other holding the bag. Set her in a sunlit cobblestone shopping lane lined with boutique windows, flower planters, and soft pastel architecture, with 2 visible signs reading "Rose Town" and "Rose Garden". Use luminous spring lighting, cool blue-violet shadows, sparkling highlights, abundant floral details, and a polished painterly anime style with a dreamy, refined, high-end illustration finish.
